reasoning: 1. TP Dist: 2550.0 (Targeting Value Area Low). 2. SL Dist: 1150.0 (Base 1.8x ATR + 0.1x Offset above POC). 3. TP/SL Ratio: 2.22. 4. Regime: RANGING/BREAKDOWN. 5. Logic: Price has decisively broken below the Point of Control (POC) at 66128 on the 15m chart with a massive volume spike, signaling institutional selling. The descending triangle consolidation has resolved to the downside, invalidating the previous support thesis. The POC is now expected to act as overhead resistance, with the next major liquidity target being the Value Area Low (VAL) near 63500.
reasoning_zh: 1. 止盈距离: 2550.0 (目标位价值区低点 VAL)。 2. 止损距离: 1150.0 (1.8x ATR + 0.1x 偏移，设在 POC 上方)。 3. 盈亏比: 2.22。 4. 市场环境: 震荡/向下突破。 5. 逻辑: 价格已放量跌破 66128 的控制点 (POC)，15分钟图上的成交量激增确认了机构抛压。之前的下降三角形形态已向下突破，使看涨支撑逻辑失效。POC 现在转为上方阻力位，短期目标看向 63500 附近的价值区低点 (VAL)。
